case_title: SUNIL PRASAD VS. DENNIS CLAY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRASAD, SUNIL OWNER AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES) DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRASAD, SUNIL OWNER SERVED MAR-25-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERSON, YVONNE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRASAD, SUNIL OWNER SERVED MAR-25-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES)
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $56.66 PER DAY; DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRASAD, SUNIL OWNER
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERSON, YVONNE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRASAD, SUNIL OWNER AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-29-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DENNIS CLAY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES) HEARING SET FOR MAY-29-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES)
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PRASAD, SUNIL OWNER AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRASAD, SUNIL OWNER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES) JEFFERSON, YVONNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 330 WINDING WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94112 (MID FLOOR UNIT), SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CLAY, DENNIS (OWES COURT FEES) JEFFERSON, YVONNE

REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR. DEFENDANT DENNIS CLAY'S REQUEST FOR FEE WAIVER WAS DENIED ON 5/29/13. JUDGMENT FILED AS TO DENNIS CLAY. DEFEFENDANT DENNIS CLAY MUST PAY COURT FEES BEFORE FILING ANY PAPERS. (206)
